title: 3 Top-Rated Dividend Stocks That Analysts Are Loving Now
text: The High Dividend Yield Vanguard ETF (NYSEARCA: VYM ) has surged by more than 6% month-over-month, suggesting that dividend stocks are regaining traction. Intuitively speaking, the resurgence does make sense as a pending interest rate pivot may initiate more confidence among dividend investors.

title: 3 Residential REITs to Bet on Amid Bright Industry Prospects
text: Despite the elevated supply of new units, high homeownership costs and tech-enabled features are likely to draw healthy rental demand, poising the Zacks Equity REIT - Residential industry players like Invitation Home (INVH), American Homes 4 Rent (AMH) and UMH Properties (UMH) well for growth.

title: Are Finance Stocks Lagging Invitation Home (INVH) This Year?
text: Here is how Invitation Home (INVH) and Enact Holdings, Inc. (ACT) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: How Institutional Buyers Are Changing the Face of the U.S. Housing Market
text: The housing boom during the pandemic drew investors due to low rates, easy capital access and rising property values. The investor frenzy waned when rates rose in spring 2022.
